title: T-59 Test Hardening — corpus negative-path and contract drift tests
summary: Add negative-path corpus manifest tests and artifact-contract drift-detection tests.
acceptance_criteria: 7 new negative-path tests in test_corpus.py cover malformed JSON, non-object root, missing fields, unsupported mode, and discover_corpus_manifests edge cases.
8 new drift-detection tests in test_artifact_contracts.py prove each assertion helper raises AssertionError on incorrect payloads.
29 tests pass in both files combined.
